title: VITEVER 12 Pieces 5.5 Inches Large Red Gold Christmas Flower, Xmas Glitter Poinsettia Artificial Flowers Heads, Christmas Tree Decorations, Xmas Decor, Xmas Garland Wreaths DIY Decorations
features: MATERIAL - Poinsettias artificial flowers are made of silk. The faux flowers have glitter on them that makes them look more shiny.
SIZE & PACKAGE -12PCS glitter poinsettias flowers per item. The flower head diameter approx 14cm. They come with clips and stems for your decorating needs.

RESHAPE METHODS - During long-distance transportation,these silk flowers need to be fluffed when you pull them out of the package.You can use a blow dryer to fluff them. The glitter on the flower will shed so please find a suitable place to reshape them.

ADVANTAGES - These artificial flowers are a low maintenance,suitable addition to any places. They can be used as decorative ornaments for Christmas trees,garlands,etc.,and can be used as a single steam flower for flower arrangement. They do not need careful care. Fake flower is not as fragile as fresh flower, which is more conducive to DIY.

WIDE APPLICATION - Suitable addition for your Christmas display,Xmas tree decor,wreaths,garlands,mantle decor,shelf decor,winter decor,door decor,Christmas party decor,fireplace decor,table decor,doorway decor，Scrapbook, Decorating Kitchen, Stairs, Chairs, Doors, Aisle, Valentine Bouquets,
